creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
avilla      2011-03-09 13:18:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/plasma-applet-serverstatuswidget Makefile distinfo 
                                               pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Server Status Widget is a KDE 4 Plasma applet that lets you monitor one or more
  servers via pings, TCP connects or custom unix commands at a configurable
  interval.  The icon changes if a server does not respond to a check, optionally
  triggering configurable KDE notifications.
  
  WWW: http://kde-look.org/content/show.php?content=101336
  
  PR:             ports/155122
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.423     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-serverstatuswidget/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-serverstatuswidget/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-serverstatuswidget/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/deskutils/plasma-applet-serverstatuswidget/pkg-plist (new)
